question: A gray day lands. What shade of gray is it?
dek: Every city has its own gray. Pick the one the window's wearing today.

options.label: LA-gray · marine layer before burnoff
options.hint: El Segundo morning · soft-focus sun · 62°F · Pacific edge

options.label: London-gray · wool + drizzle
options.hint: Thames basin · all day · no pressure to cheer up

options.label: Tokyo-gray · winter cloud over cedar
options.hint: Yoyogi · low contrast · everything a little quieter

options.label: NYC-gray · between-seasons steel
options.hint: Flatiron roofline · wind down the avenues · heavier coat back out

options.label: Mallorca-gray · Tramuntana overcast
options.hint: Deià cliffs under a lid · sea still warm · no one in a rush

options.label: Medway-gray · pre-storm humidity
options.hint: Charles River green-gray · peepers loud · something's coming

outcomeAction: Winning gray gets a companion Sky Clock vignette tuned to that exact light.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'prepare next sprint, go' · zeitgeist cluster: weather-moods, entry poll wiring into Sky Clock zones
